services.name: Sentara Norfolk General Hospital
services.notes: Level I Trauma Center and teaching hospital affiliated with Eastern Virginia Medical School (EVMS). Full emergency department, cardiac center, burn center.

services.name: Children's Hospital of The King's Daughters (CHKD)
services.notes: Children's hospital adjacent to Sentara Norfolk General. Not relevant for retirees but indicates strength of local medical infrastructure.

services.name: Naval Medical Center Portsmouth
services.address: 620 John Paul Jones Circle, Portsmouth, VA 23708
services.notes: Military hospital across the Elizabeth River in Portsmouth. Available to veterans and military retirees with Tricare.

services.name: CVS Pharmacy - Ghent
services.notes: Central Ghent location, open 7 days. Drive-through available. COVID and flu vaccines.

services.name: Walgreens - Granby Street
services.notes: Full-service pharmacy with drive-through. Extended hours.

services.name: Harris Teeter - Ghent
services.notes: Full-service grocery in downtown/Ghent area. Deli, bakery, sushi bar. Open 6am-11pm.

services.name: Kroger - Little Creek Road
services.notes: Large format store with pharmacy, fuel center, and pickup/delivery service.

services.name: ALDI - Norfolk
services.notes: Budget-friendly grocery option in Ghent area. Good for staples and produce.

services.name: TowneBank - Downtown Norfolk
services.notes: Regional bank headquartered in Hampton Roads. Full-service branch with wealth management.

services.name: Navy Federal Credit Union - Norfolk
services.address: 1530 East Little Creek Road, Norfolk, VA 23518
services.notes: World's largest credit union. Open to military, veterans, and their families. Multiple ATMs throughout Hampton Roads.

services.name: Boulevard Veterinary Hospital
services.notes: Full-service veterinary clinic in Ghent area. Routine care, surgery, dental, and boarding.

services.name: Ghent Veterinary Clinic
services.notes: Small animal practice in central Ghent. Wellness exams, vaccinations, and minor procedures.

services.name: Beach Veterinary Emergency Clinic
services.notes: 24-hour emergency and critical care veterinary hospital in adjacent Virginia Beach. Closest emergency vet.

services.name: The Tide Light Rail - Downtown Norfolk Station
services.notes: Virginia's only light rail system. 7.4-mile route from Eastern Virginia Medical Center to Newtown Road with connections to Virginia Beach. $2.00 single ride.

services.name: Hampton Roads Transit (HRT) Bus System
services.notes: Regional bus system serving Norfolk, Virginia Beach, Chesapeake, Hampton, and Newport News. $2.00 single ride, $4.50 day pass.

services.name: Norfolk International Airport (ORF)
services.notes: Regional airport with nonstop service to major hubs (ATL, CLT, DFW, ORD, DCA, JFK, PHL). Airlines include Delta, American, United, Southwest, Frontier, Breeze.

services.name: Slover Library (Main Branch)
services.notes: Norfolk's flagship library in a renovated 1904 building downtown. Maker spaces, recording studio, genealogy center, free Wi-Fi. Part of Norfolk Public Library system with 10 branches.

services.name: Larchmont Library
services.notes: Branch library serving the Larchmont-Edgewater and ODU area. Community programming, children's room, free Wi-Fi.

services.name: Northside Park Dog Park
services.notes: Fenced off-leash dog park with separate areas for large and small dogs. Water fountains, benches.

services.name: Stockley Gardens
services.notes: Popular Ghent park for dog walking (leash required). Twice-yearly Stockley Gardens Arts Festival. Not fenced but heavily used by dog owners.

services.name: Norfolk Fitness & Wellness Center
services.notes: City-run recreation center with pool, gym, group fitness classes. Senior memberships available at reduced rates.

services.name: Planet Fitness - Norfolk
services.notes: Budget gym at $10-25/month. 24/7 access. Basic equipment and group fitness.

services.name: Chrysler Museum of Art
services.notes: World-class art museum with free admission. Over 30,000 works including a renowned glass collection and Perry Glass Studio.

services.name: Norfolk Botanical Garden
services.notes: 175-acre garden with themed gardens, boat tours, and walking trails. Adjacent to Norfolk International Airport. Senior admission discounts available.

services.name: Nauticus & Battleship Wisconsin
services.notes: Maritime science center and WWII battleship on the downtown waterfront. Includes the Hampton Roads Naval Museum (free).

services.name: Wegmans
services.notes: Mid-Atlantic mainstream supermarket chain.

services.name: Aldi
services.notes: Hard-discount supermarket chain — nationwide.

services.name: Best Buy
services.notes: Largest US consumer-electronics chain.

services.name: The Home Depot
services.notes: Largest US home-improvement chain.
